sentences.arabic: أَعْتَقِدُ أَنَّ الْعَائِلَةَ أَهَمُّ شَيْءٍ فِي الْحَيَاةِ.
sentences.translation: Smatram da je porodica najvažnija stvar u životu.
sentences.translationEn: I believe that family is the most important thing in life.

sentences.arabic: حِينَ تَكُونُ مَعَ عَائِلَتِكَ تَشْعُرُ بِالْأَمَانِ.
sentences.translation: Kada si s porodicom, osjećaš se sigurno.
sentences.translationEn: When you are with your family you feel safe.

sentences.arabic: أُحِبُّ أَنْ نَجْتَمِعَ كُلَّ مَسَاءٍ عَلَى مَائِدَةِ الطَّعَامِ.
sentences.translation: Volim da se svake večeri okupimo za stolom za ručak.
sentences.translationEn: I like us to gather every evening at the dinner table.

sentences.arabic: هَذِهِ اللَّحَظَاتُ الْبَسِيطَةُ هِيَ أَجْمَلُ ذِكْرَيَاتِنَا.
sentences.translation: Ovi jednostavni trenuci su naše najljepše uspomene.
sentences.translationEn: These simple moments are our most beautiful memories.
